scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && npm run start -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/shared && npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w backend
scripts.deploy:frontend: npm run build:shared && npm run build:frontend
scripts.diff:staging: cd infrastructure && npx cdk diff TableTryb-staging
scripts.diff:prod: cd infrastructure && npx cdk diff TableTryb-prod
